dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9126 IH: HCBS Anti-Fraud Reporting Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Latta (for himself, Mr. Taylor, Mr. Barrett, and Mr. Arrington) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend title XIX of the Social Security Act to require States to report on anti-fraud measures relating to home and community-based services furnished under the Medicaid program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the HCBS Anti-Fraud Reporting Act of 2026.

section.header: Requiring States to report on anti-fraud measures relating to home and community-based services furnished under the Medicaid program
section.text: Section 1915(c)(2) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1396n(c)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (D), by striking and at the end;
in subparagraph (E), by striking the period and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:

subparagraph.text: with respect to 2026 and each subsequent year, the State will report to the Secretary on—

clause.text: any waste, fraud, or abuse detected by the State relating to services furnished under such waiver; and
efforts taken by the State to prevent such waste, fraud, and abuse.
